items.markdown:
The best Himalayan salt products are categorized by their use in cooking, wellness, and home decor, with top brands including **The Spice Lab**, **Himalayan Chef** , and **WBM** . These products are favored for their high mineral content (containing 84+ trace minerals) and lack of additives.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:4466886897532435564,catalogid:4595401422180423892,gpcid:14610341768339181244,mid:576462829882279001&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.amazon.com/live/video/005c22f7db4d45eca64ea40fca688a60#:~:text=Top%205%20Himalayan%20pink%20salts:%20Plant%20Therapy%2C,and%20Himalayan%20Chef.%20All%20contain%2084+%20minerals.)[[3]](https://saltandumber.com/best-himalayan-salt-brand/?srsltid=AfmBOoqS9T2ZwkDb2uTFQTm8gCoAM3EeGSo6kO7amYLm2SfmvveImsCo#:~:text=You'll%20want%20Himalayan%20salt,deliver%20exceptional%20quality%20and%20versatility.)[[4]](https://us.amazon.com/Best-Sellers-Household-Salt-Lamps/zgbs/hi/5759978011)[[5]](https://www.justdial.com/Kutch/Rock-Salt-Manufacturers/nct-10411787#:~:text=These%20brands%20focus%20on%20sourcing%20the%20best,appealing%20to%20health-conscious%20consumers%20who%20prioritize%20quality.)
